headline: Is Exxon Mobil (XOM) Pricing Reflect Its 68% One Year Surge And Cash Flow Outlook
summary: If you are wondering whether Exxon Mobil's current share price fairly reflects its long term potential, you are not alone. This article will focus squarely on what you are paying versus what you may be getting. Exxon Mobil shares recently closed at US$163.91, with a 7 day return of a 3.4% decline, a 30 day return of 8.4%, a year to date return of 33.6% and a 1 year return of 68.2% that may change how you think about both upside and risk. These moves have been set against ongoing attention on...
